head_html: <style>.portal-page{background:#f5f4ee;color:#17352d;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;min-height:100vh}.portal-wrap{max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px}.portal-page a{color:#1d4d3d;text-decoration:none}.portal-page a:hover{text-decoration:underline}.portal-shell{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:22px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #d7d3c8;flex-wrap:wrap}.portal-branding p,.portal-muted{margin:0;color:#5c746b;line-height:1.6}.portal-brand{font:700 20px Georgia,serif;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}.portal-nav{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}.portal-nav__link,.portal-button,.portal-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #1d4d3d;background:#fff;color:#1d4d3d;font-weight:600}.portal-nav__link.active,.portal-button--solid{background:#1d4d3d;color:#fff}.portal-button--ghost{background:#fff}.portal-hero{padding:44px 0 18px}.portal-note,.portal-kicker{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#537a68}.portal-hero h1,.portal-card h2{margin:0 0 12px;font-family:Georgia,serif;color:#17352d}.portal-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5vw,4.4rem);line-height:1.04}.portal-copy,.portal-lead{max-width:760px;line-height:1.7;color:#446259}.portal-grid{display:grid;gap:22px}.portal-grid--stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));padding:18px 0 28px}.portal-grid--overview{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));padding-bottom:28px}.portal-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd8cc;border-radius:24px;padding:24px}.portal-stat h2{font-size:30px;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:8px}.portal-stat__label,.portal-stat__meta{margin:0}.portal-section-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;margin-bottom:18px}.portal-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.portal-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px solid #ece6da}.portal-row:first-child{border-top:0;padding-top:0}.portal-row__actions{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px}.portal-location{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px solid #ece6da}.portal-location:first-child{border-top:0;padding-top:0}.portal-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:18px}.portal-text-link{font-weight:600}.portal-form{display:grid;gap:14px}.portal-form__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px}.portal-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.portal-field input,.portal-field textarea,.portal-field select{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid #d7d3c8;border-radius:16px;background:#fbfaf7;color:#17352d;font:inherit}.portal-field textarea{min-height:110px;resize:vertical}.portal-message{display:none;margin-top:14px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:16px;background:#e8f3ec;color:#17352d;font-weight:600}.portal-message.is-visible{display:block}.portal-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:30px 0 48px;border-top:1px solid #d7d3c8;margin-top:28px;color:#5c746b}.portal-footer__links{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}.portal-richtext{padding:18px 0;line-height:1.75;color:#203d35}.portal-richtext h1,.portal-richtext h2,.portal-richtext h3,.portal-richtext h4{font-family:Georgia,serif;color:#17352d}.portal-divider{border-top:1px solid #ece6da;margin:18px 0}.portal-inline-summary{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}.portal-inline-summary span{padding:8px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:#f3f0e7;color:#355347;font-size:13px;font-weight:600}@media (max-width:980px){.portal-grid--stats,.portal-grid--overview,.portal-form__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media (max-width:720px){.portal-wrap{padding:0 18px}.portal-grid--stats,.portal-grid--overview,.portal-form__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.portal-row,.portal-section-head,.portal-footer{flex-direction:column}.portal-row__actions{align-items:flex-start}}</style><meta name='robots' content='noindex, nofollow'><script>(function(){function csrf(){var match=document.cookie.match(/(?:^|; )csrf_token=([^;]+)/);if(match){return decodeURIComponent(match[1]);}if(window.frappe&&frappe.csrf_token){return frappe.csrf_token;}if(window.csrf_token){return window.csrf_token;}return '';}function extractMessage(body){if(body&&body.message){body=body.message;}if(body&&body._server_messages){try{var messages=JSON.parse(body._server_messages);if(messages&&messages.length){return JSON.parse(messages[0]).message||'Unable to save changes.';}}catch(e){}}if(body&&body.exc){return 'Unable to save changes.';}if(typeof body==='string'&&body){return body;}if(body&&body.message){return body.message;}return '';}async function submitForm(form){var endpoint=form.getAttribute('data-portal-endpoint');var formData=new FormData(form);var payload={};formData.forEach(function(value,key){payload[key]=value;});var messageBox=form.querySelector('[data-portal-message]');if(messageBox){messageBox.classList.remove('is-visible');messageBox.textContent='';}try{var response=await fetch(endpoint,{method:'POST',credentials:'same-origin',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','X-Frappe-CSRF-Token':csrf()},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});var body=await response.json().catch(function(){return {};});if(!response.ok||body.exc||body.exception){throw new Error(extractMessage(body)||'Unable to save changes.');}if(messageBox){messageBox.textContent=extractMessage(body)||'Changes saved.';messageBox.classList.add('is-visible');}window.setTimeout(function(){window.location.reload();},600);}catch(error){if(messageBox){messageBox.textContent=error.message||'Unable to save changes.';messageBox.classList.add('is-visible');messageBox.style.background='#f7e6e0';}else{window.alert(error.message||'Unable to save changes.');}}}document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){document.querySelectorAll('form[data-portal-endpoint]').forEach(function(form){form.addEventListener('submit',function(event){event.preventDefault();submitForm(form);});});});})();</script>

Georgia,serif;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}.portal-nav{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}.portal-nav__link,.portal-button,.portal-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:10px 18px}.portal-note,.portal-kicker{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#537a68}.portal-hero h1,.portal-card h2{margin:0 0 12px;font-family:Georgia,serif;color:#17352d}.portal-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5vw,4.4rem);line-height:1.04}.portal-copy{max-width:760px;line-height:1.7;color:#446259}.portal-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd8cc;border-radius:24px;padding:24px}.portal-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;padding-bottom:18px}.portal-section-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;margin-bottom:18px}.portal-pill{background:#f3f0e7;border-color:#d7d3c8;color:#355347}.portal-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:18px}.portal-form{display:grid;gap:14px}.portal-form__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px}.portal-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.portal-field input,.portal-field textarea,.portal-field select{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid #d7d3c8;border-radius:16px;background:#fbfaf7;color:#17352d;font:inherit}.portal-field textarea{min-height:110px;resize:vertical}.portal-message{display:none;margin-top:14px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:16px;background:#e8f3ec;color:#17352d;font-weight:600}.portal-message.is-visible{display:block}.portal-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:30px 0 48px;border-top:1px solid #d7d3c8;margin-top:28px;color:#5c746b}.portal-footer__links{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}@media (max-width:720px){.portal-wrap{padding:0 18px}.portal-section-head,.portal-footer{flex-direction:column}.portal-form__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}</style><meta name='robots' content='noindex, nofollow'><script>(function(){function csrf(){var match=document.cookie.match(/(?:^|; )csrf_token=([^;]+)/);if(match){return decodeURIComponent(match[1]);}if(window.frappe&&frappe.csrf_token){return frappe.csrf_token;}if(window.csrf_token){return window.csrf_token;}return '';}function extractMessage(body){if(body&&body.message){body=body.message;}if(body&&body._server_messages){try{var messages=JSON.parse(body._server_messages);if(messages&&messages.length){return JSON.parse(messages[0]).message||'Unable to save changes.';}}catch(e){}}if(body&&body.exc){return 'Unable to save changes.';}if(typeof body==='string'&&body){return body;}if(body&&body.message){return body.message;}return '';}async function submitForm(form){var endpoint=form.getAttribute('data-portal-endpoint');var formData=new FormData(form);var payload={};formData.forEach(function(value,key){payload[key]=value;});var messageBox=form.querySelector('[data-portal-message]');if(messageBox){messageBox.classList.remove('is-visible');messageBox.textContent='';messageBox.style.background='';}try{var response=await fetch(endpoint,{method:'POST',credentials:'same-origin',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','X-Frappe-CSRF-Token':csrf()},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});var body=await response.json().catch(function(){return {};});if(!response.ok||body.exc||body.exception){throw new Error(extractMessage(body)||'Unable to save changes.');}if(messageBox){messageBox.textContent=extractMessage(body)||'Changes saved.';messageBox.classList.add('is-visible');}window.setTimeout(function(){window.location.reload();},600);}catch(error){if(messageBox){messageBox.textContent=error.message||'Unable to save changes.';messageBox.classList.add('is-visible');messageBox.style.background='#f7e6e0';}}}document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){document.querySelectorAll('form[data-portal-endpoint]').forEach(function(form){form.addEventListener('submit',function(event){event.preventDefault();submitForm(form);});});});})();</script>
